chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2989 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 11.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aamir Baig, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------------- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for applicant does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that the applicant has been acquitted by learned trial Court by way of compromise. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is accordingly dismissed, as having become infructuous. The surety furnished in the instant criminal bail application is no more required, therefore, the office is directed to return the surety to the Surety, after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
